caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a white shirt with gold suspenders, a red bow tie, and a distinctive gray wig styled in a spiky fashion. He also has on black headphones and glasses, suggesting he is engaged in an audio recording session. The background is filled with framed photographs and memorabilia, indicating a personal or professional space dedicated to the show. In the background, a child can be seen playing near a mannequin, adding a casual and lively atmosphere to the scene. The man appears to be speaking or reacting to something, as his mouth is open and his expression is animated.
